title: Helpers--Extraction Workers
description: Help extraction craft workers, such as earth drillers, blasters and explosives workers, derrick operators, and mining machine operators, by performing duties requiring less skill. Duties include supplying equipment or cleaning work area.

tasks.text: Observe and monitor equipment operation during the extraction process to detect any problems.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Drive moving equipment to transport materials and parts to excavation sites.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Unload materials, devices, and machine parts, using hand tools.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Set up and adjust equipment used to excavate geological materials.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Organize materials to prepare for use.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Repair and maintain automotive and drilling equipment, using hand tools.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Clean up work areas and remove debris after extraction activities are complete.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Clean and prepare sites for excavation or boring.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Load materials into well holes or into equipment, using hand tools.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Provide assistance to extraction craft workers, such as earth drillers and derrick operators.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Collect and examine geological matter, using hand tools and testing devices.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Signal workers to start geological material extraction or boring.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Dismantle extracting and boring equipment used for excavation, using hand tools.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.
Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.
